definition:
1. having a lot  or share in  a thing, with genitive, (Sophocles Tragicus); λαχεῖν ἔγκληρά τινι to have an equal share with  another, (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. having a share  of an inheritance, an heir, heiress , (Euripides) 
3. ἔγκληρος εὐνή a marriage which brings wealth , (Euripides); ἔγκ. πεδία land possessed as an inheritance , (Euripides) (ML)
